summary_en: 50,000 shares (0.7% of shares outstanding) acquired for ¥38.9M via open-market purchase under discretionary execution contract. Authorization limit of ¥45M and 50,000 shares reached. Execution window 25 Nov 2025 – 14 May 2026. Board resolution 14 Nov 2025.
title_en: Notification of Acquisition Results and Completion of Treasury Share Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Commerce One Holdings completed a treasury share acquisition program authorized by board resolution on 14 November 2025. The company acquired 50,000 ordinary shares for a total of ¥38.88 million via open-market purchase under a discretionary execution contract. This represents 0.7% of shares outstanding and exhausts both the authorized share count limit (50,000 shares) and the yen authorization ceiling (¥45 million). The execution window ran from 25 November 2025 through 14 May 2026, on an execution-date basis. The final tranche (3,300 shares for ¥2.44 million) closed the program on 13 May 2026, when the upper share limit was reached.
